name: Strategic-Milestone-Attainment-Rate (SMAR)
description: Calculates the 'Velocity-of-Success' by measuring the ratio of 'Milestones-Validated' against 'Milestones-Scheduled' within a specific 'Market-Opportunity-Window'.
goalMapping: Identifies 'Execution-Lag' and prevents 'Opportunity-Cost' accumulation in the 10-agent array.
